title: OmniFormatter SQL / GraphQL Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for SQL dialects and GraphQL.

sql__keywordCase.description: [SQL] Case for reserved SQL keywords: SELECT, FROM, WHERE.

sql__identifierCase.description: [SQL] Case for table, column, and alias identifiers.

sql__commaPlacement.description: [SQL] Commas at end (after) or start (before) of SELECT list lines.

sql__joinStyle.description: [SQL] Require explicit JOIN keyword. Comma-separated FROM tables are discouraged.

sql__aliasingStyle.description: [SQL] Use AS keyword for aliases: table AS t vs table t.

graphql__fieldOrdering.description: [GraphQL] Order fields within type definitions alphabetically.

graphql__operationNaming.description: [GraphQL] Naming convention for query, mutation, and subscription operations.
